text.title: PM Tool Selection Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply PM Tool Selection end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: long-list-vendors
step.action: Identify 6-10 vendors; pre-filter to 3-4 short-list candidates.
step.decision-gate: If only 1 candidate, broaden the search.

step.name: two-week-bake-off
step.action: Sandbox each vendor with representative workflows; score on 5 dimensions.
step.decision-gate: If any vendor scores ≤3 on TCO, drop.

step.name: draft-adr-and-decide
step.action: Author ADR with context, options, decision, consequences, reversal_trigger.

step.name: publish-and-track
step.action: Publish; schedule annual review of reversal_trigger.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix before publish.
